Label: /F10/
Issue: Does not specify the maximum file size for PCAP files
Correction: The system shall support loading PCAP files up to a maximum size of 2GB.

Label: /F20/
Issue: Does not specify the default values for the preprocessor configuration
Correction: The system shall provide default values for the preprocessor configuration: Length scaling: 150, Value scaling: Off, Normalization: None, Autoencoder and PCA are selected, Number of hidden layers: 4, Number of nodes in hidden layers: (256, 64, 32, 8), Loss function: MSE, Number of epochs for the training: 100, Optimizer: adam.

Label: /F30/
Issue: Does not specify the color coding for different protocols in the network topology graph
Correction: The system shall use distinct colors for each protocol in the network topology graph, e.g., HTTP: Blue, FTP: Green, TCP: Red.

Label: /F40/
Issue: Does not specify the shapes used for different protocols in the preprocessor results graph
Correction: The system shall use distinct shapes for each protocol in the preprocessor results graph, e.g., HTTP: Circle, FTP: Square, TCP: Triangle.

Label: /F50/
Issue: Does not specify the method for merging performance graphs
Correction: The system shall provide an option to merge performance graphs by overlaying them with different colors for each run.

Label: /F60/
Issue: Does not specify the zoom level increments for graphs
Correction: The system shall allow zooming in and out of graphs in increments of 10%.

Label: /F70/
Issue: Does not specify the image file formats for saving graphs
Correction: The system shall support saving graphs as images in PNG, JPEG, and SVG formats.

Label: /F80/
Issue: Does not specify the method for selecting runs to compare
Correction: The system shall provide a dropdown menu to select runs for comparison, allowing users to choose up to three runs at a time.

Label: /F90/
Issue: Does not specify the responsiveness criteria for asynchronous interaction
Correction: The system shall ensure that the user interface remains responsive with a maximum delay of 500ms during asynchronous interactions.

Label: /F100/
Issue: Does not specify the types of statistics to be shown for the input PCAP file
Correction: The system shall display the following statistics for the input PCAP file: Total number of packets, Number of unique devices, Number of protocols used, and Packet size distribution.

Label: /F200/
Issue: Does not specify the window size for opening graphs in their own window
Correction: The system shall open graphs in a new window with a default size of 800x600 pixels, which can be resized by the user.

Label: /F210/
Issue: Does not specify the default key bindings for commonly used functionality
Correction: The system shall provide the following default key bindings: Open saved session: Ctrl + O, Save session: Ctrl + S, Save session as: Ctrl + Alt + S, Run preprocessor: Ctrl + R.

Label: /F220/
Issue: Does not specify the format for identifiers inside a saved session
Correction: The system shall use UUID format for identifiers inside a saved session.

Label: /F230/
Issue: Does not specify the warning message for handling large amounts of data
Correction: The system shall display a warning message: "The selected PCAP file contains more than 2 million packets. The program may become less responsive."

Label: /F240/
Issue: Does not specify the format for the PDF report of the current session
Correction: The system shall generate a PDF report with the following sections: Preprocessing configurations, Results, Performance graphs, and Summary.
